title: E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard
description: Full-stack analytics platform with real-time data visualization and predictive insights
detail_description: Built a comprehensive analytics platform for e-commerce businesses to track sales, customer behavior, and inventory in real-time. The platform processes over 1M events daily and provides actionable insights through interactive dashboards.
challenges: Handling real-time data streams at scale while maintaining sub-second query performance. Complex data relationships between products, customers, and transactions.
solution: Implemented a hybrid architecture with Redis for real-time caching and PostgreSQL for historical analytics. Used D3.js for custom visualizations and WebSockets for live updates.
outcome: Reduced client reporting time by 85% and increased data-driven decision making by 60%.

title: Healthcare Data Platform
description: Patient data management system with HIPAA-compliant security and intuitive dashboards
detail_description: A secure healthcare data platform enabling medical professionals to access and analyze patient data while maintaining strict HIPAA compliance. Features role-based access control and audit logging.
challenges: Balancing data accessibility with security requirements. Complex compliance needs across multiple jurisdictions.
solution: Implemented end-to-end encryption with AWS KMS. Built custom middleware for audit trails and access control. Used Tableau embedded analytics for secure visualizations.
outcome: Achieved HIPAA compliance certification and onboarded 12 healthcare providers within 6 months.

title: NLP Sentiment Tool
description: Real-time sentiment analysis using transformer models for social media monitoring
detail_description: An AI-powered sentiment analysis tool that processes social media streams in real-time to gauge public opinion on brands, products, and topics. Supports 12 languages with 94% accuracy.
challenges: Training models on diverse social media language including slang and emojis. Real-time processing of high-volume streams.
solution: Fine-tuned BERT models on custom datasets. Implemented Redis Streams for message queuing and FastAPI for low-latency inference endpoints.
outcome: Processing 50K+ messages daily for 8 enterprise clients with 94% accuracy.

title: Financial Portfolio Tracker
description: Investment tracking with risk analysis and automated reporting features
detail_description: A personal finance application that aggregates investment accounts, tracks performance, and generates automated reports with risk analysis and tax optimization suggestions.
challenges: Integrating with multiple financial APIs with different data formats. Complex calculations for portfolio analytics.
solution: Built a unified API abstraction layer. Implemented Web Workers for heavy calculations. Used React Query for efficient data fetching.
outcome: Users report 40% better understanding of their investments and 25% improved portfolio performance.

title: Education Performance Dashboard
description: Student analytics platform for educators with progress tracking and insights
detail_description: Analytics dashboard for K-12 educators to track student performance, identify at-risk students, and optimize teaching strategies through data-driven insights.
challenges: Protecting student privacy while enabling detailed analytics. Making complex data accessible to non-technical educators.
solution: Implemented data anonymization pipelines. Created intuitive Tableau dashboards with guided analytics features.
outcome: Helped 45 schools improve student outcomes by an average of 15% through data-informed interventions.

title: Real-time Chat App
description: Messaging platform with end-to-end encryption and file sharing capabilities
detail_description: A secure team communication platform with end-to-end encryption, file sharing, and channel management. Designed for remote teams prioritizing privacy.
challenges: Implementing E2E encryption without compromising user experience. Scaling WebSocket connections horizontally.
solution: Used Signal Protocol for encryption. Implemented Redis Pub/Sub for horizontal scaling with Docker Swarm.
outcome: Serving 10K+ daily active users with 99.9% uptime and zero security incidents.

title: Predictive Maintenance Model
description: Machine learning system for industrial equipment failure prediction
detail_description: IoT-based predictive maintenance system for manufacturing equipment using vibration and temperature sensors to predict failures 48 hours in advance.
challenges: Processing high-frequency sensor data (1000Hz). Balancing false positives with maintenance costs.
solution: Implemented edge computing with Spark Streaming. Used ensemble methods combining LSTM and Random Forest for 48-hour prediction windows.
outcome: Reduced unplanned downtime by 35% and maintenance costs by 28% for manufacturing clients.

title: Creative Agency Portfolio
description: High-performance portfolio site with immersive animations and 3D elements
detail_description: An award-winning portfolio website for a creative agency featuring WebGL transitions, 3D product showcases, and immersive storytelling experiences.
challenges: Optimizing 3D assets for web performance while maintaining visual quality. Complex scroll-triggered animations.
solution: Used Next.js image optimization and lazy loading. Implemented Framer Motion for performant animations. Used Three.js with LOD models.
outcome: Won Awwwards Site of the Day. Achieved 95+ Lighthouse scores despite heavy visual content.
